svg.title: Coalescent and Wright-Fisher duality
svg.desc: Two panels showing the same stochastic process from two directions. Left: forward Wright-Fisher spaghetti diagram with 2N = 20 chromosomes across 12 generations. Faded grey lines show all parent-child connections. Five focal present-day chromosomes are traced in bold colour backward through the spaghetti to their shared ancestor. Right: the same five lineages re-rendered as a clean coalescent tree, with coalescent events at the same times as in the left panel.
svg.text: SAME PROCESS, TWO VIEWS · FORWARD WF ↔ BACKWARD COALESCENT

g.text: The coalescent is WF run backward, conditioned on keeping only the lineages that reach the present.
faded grey lines: parent-offspring relationships WF is tracking · colored lines: the n = 5 lineages the coalescent cares about
